data.name: Game Of Puzzles: Furry
data.detailed_description:
Game Of Puzzles: Furry - 是一個益智遊戲，你必須從單個部分組裝單個圖像。
你需要收集一個大的小圖片，然後你可以去新的水平。

特徵：
  • 尺寸範圍從9到36件
  • 按鈕自動完成關卡
  • 自動保存
  • 簡單的鼠標控制
  • 傳統的益智遊戲
  • 畫廊
  • Steam成就
Credits: 這個遊戲是使用Clickteam Fusion 2.5創建的！ Erwarda Savitnaag的音樂。

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz CPU Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 1024 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512 MB
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 60 MB 可用空間

data.name: Game Of Puzzles: Furry
data.detailed_description:
Game Of Puzzles: Furry - is a puzzle game in which you have to assemble a single image from individual pieces.
You need to collect from the small pictures one big and after you may to going at the new level.

Features:
  • A range of sizes from 9 to 36 pieces
  • Button to automatically complete the level
  • Auto Saving
  • Simple mouse control
  • Traditional puzzle gameplay
  • Gallery
  • Steam Achievements
Credits: This game was created using Clickteam Fusion 2.5! Music by Erwarda Savitnaag.
